name: thedev-id/thedev.id: Identity for developers on the web. - GitHub
snippet: thedev.id is a free identity for developers on the web. This service offers a handy subdomain like foo.thedev.id or bar.thedev.id for use on your static sites.

name: How to Obtain a Free Subdomain for Your Project? | FrontEnd Web

name: GitHub - abint7/free-domains: Free subdomains for personal sites
snippet: A collective list of free subdomains for use on personal sites, open source projects, and more. License This project is under the MIT License.

name: Get a Developer Oriented Domain for Free and Use it with Vercel
snippet: Add yourname.thedev.id to a service. Go to your project dashboard on Vercel and click Settings tab and select Domains then add subdomain.thedev.
